action: Shorten reader-facing captions for CH03, CH13, CH15, and other caption-risk exhibits before render.
rationale: Long captions can kill technical awe and suspense even when they are accurate.
verification_gate: Caption keeps one teaching sentence while exact source/caveat mapping remains nearby.

action: Prune or merge at least two visuals across CH15-CH16 before full-book assembly.
rationale: The industrial chapters currently risk corporate/infrastructure dashboard fatigue.
verification_gate: Chapter summaries no longer mark both chapters as crowded after selection update.

action: Resolve unresolved screenshot/product-surface slots in CH06-CH07 as capture, source-card replacement, or cut.
rationale: Product memory is valuable only when provenance and rights are not distracting.
verification_gate: Every surviving slot has capture/hash/date/rights note or a named replacement.

action: Protect the final chapter from apparatus-heavy visual endings.
rationale: The last reader emotion should be judgment, not checklist residue.
verification_gate: Final render or storyboard shows the last page ending on prose/motif.

action: Add or test one source/scene texture beat in CH02-CH05 only where it increases suspense or warmth.
rationale: Early single-visual chapters risk textbook dryness.
verification_gate: New beat must have story purpose and clean provenance; otherwise prose carries the load.

action: Separate comparison clusters with prose, method notes, or mechanism relief.
rationale: Leaderboards are addictive when uncertainty is visible; back-to-back matrices flatten the story.
verification_gate: No comparison cluster appears without nearby methodology/caveat text.

action: Use source-card substitutions where they improve trust and reader curiosity.
rationale: Source cards can add delight through tension without rights-heavy screenshots.
verification_gate: Replacement has a reader-effect job, not just lower rights risk.

action: Create A/B layout tests for duplicated visual families in CH08, CH19, CH22, and CH24.
rationale: Some strong visual systems may repeat the same emotional beat.
verification_gate: A/B note records which version improves page-turn momentum.
